headlines.headline: Crevex Labs warns of supply chain disruptions affecting Asia Pacific operations

sentiment.reasoning: Supply chain disruptions in a key region will negatively impact operations and potentially increase costs, leading to reduced profitability.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
